title: Decadent Basque Rice Paella
description: A show-stopping Spanish dish from the Basque region, featuring mixed spice and anti-inflammatory-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: mixed spice blend (pimenton, saffron, and paprika)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the diced red bell pepper and sauté for 2 minutes.
Add the mixed spice blend and smoked paprika, and cook for 1 minute.
Add the rice and stir to coat with the spice mixture.
Add the broth, tomato paste, and artichoke hearts, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Add the kalamata olives and lemon juice, and stir to combine.
Simmer for an additional 5 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid has been absorbed.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
